title: ActiveCampaign vs Klaviyo (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare ActiveCampaign and Klaviyo. See pricing, features, and which email marketing platform suits your business best.
h1: ActiveCampaign vs Klaviyo: Detailed Feature & Pricing Comparison
intro: ActiveCampaign and Klaviyo are two leading email marketing platforms, but they serve different business needs. ActiveCampaign excels in advanced automation and CRM functionality for service-based businesses, while Klaviyo is purpose-built for e-commerce brands. This comparison helps you determine which platform aligns best with your marketing goals and budget.

comparison_table.tool_a: Lead scoring, site tracking, CRM integration

choose_a_if: You need comprehensive CRM functionality combined with email marketing
You rely on advanced lead scoring and site tracking capabilities
You want affiliate earning potential through a 20-30% recurring commission program
choose_b_if: You run an e-commerce store on Shopify or WooCommerce
You want to start for free and upgrade as you grow
You need predictive analytics and customer review management built-in

faq.a: Neither is universally better—it depends on your use case. ActiveCampaign wins for businesses needing advanced automation, CRM, and lead scoring across multiple industries. Klaviyo is superior for e-commerce brands prioritizing predictive analytics and Shopify integration. Compare your specific needs against each platform's strengths.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, ActiveCampaign or Klaviyo?
faq.a: Klaviyo is cheaper for small businesses, with a free tier for up to 500 contacts. ActiveCampaign starts at $15/month with no free option but may offer better value if you need CRM and advanced automation. For growing e-commerce, Klaviyo's paid plans ($45+) often provide better pricing.

faq.q: Can I switch from Klaviyo to ActiveCampaign?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support data migration, though the process requires manual export/import of contacts and automation workflows. Most users can migrate their email lists relatively easily, but complex automation flows may need rebuilding. Contact each platform's support team for specific migration assistance.
